name: Beefy Biscuit Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the beef and drain. Stir in the spaghetti sauce; cook over medium heat for 5-10 minutes or until heated through.
2. Press biscuits onto the bottom and up the sides of greased muffin cups.
3. Spoon spoonfuls (not tablespoonfuls) meat mixture into the center of each cup.
4. Bake at 375°F for 15-17 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Sprinkle with cheese; bake 3 more minutes or until the cheese is melted.
